article.title: Intel Xeon 7 ‘Diamond Rapids’ CPUs officially launching in 2027 on Intel 18A-P — next-gen P-core Xeon features PCIe 6.0, 50% higher core counts, and twice the memory bandwidth
article.summary: Intel has officially confirmed its next-gen Xeon 7 Diamond Rapids CPUs are coming in 2027, featuring 50% higher core counts and twice the memory bandwidth of Xeon 6 in a bid to compete against AMD’s upcoming EPYC Venice CPUs.
article.title_zh: Intel Xeon 7 'Diamond Rapids' CPU 將於 2027 年正式在 Intel 18A-P 上推出——下一代 P 核心 Xeon 支援 PCIe 6.0、核心數增加 50% 和記憶體頻寬翻倍
article.summary_zh: Intel 正式確認下一代 Xeon 7 Diamond Rapids CPU 將於 2027 年推出，核心數增加 50%，記憶體頻寬翻倍，以對抗 AMD 即將推出的 EPYC Venice CPU。

article.title: Nvidia unveils RTX Spark Superchip for laptops and desktop PCs at Computex 2026 – new platform promises to turn Windows into an agentic AI OS with Arm CPU, Blackwell GPU, and 128GB unified memory
article.summary: At Computex 2026, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang unveiled the RTX Spark Superchip, a new Arm laptop and desktop platform that powers agentic AI on Windows with a 20-core Arm CPU, powerful 6144-CUDA-core Blackwell GPU, and up to 128 GB of local memory.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 在 Computex 2026 推出 RTX Spark 超級芯片——新平台承諾將 Windows 轉變為智能體 AI OS，搭載 Arm CPU、Blackwell GPU 和 128GB 統一記憶體
article.summary_zh: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang 在 Computex 2026 發佈 RTX Spark Superchip，這是一款 Arm 筆記型電腦和桌上型電腦平台，具備 20 核 Arm CPU、強大的 6144-CUDA-核心 Blackwell GPU 和高達 128GB 的本地記憶體，為 Windows 帶來智能體 AI 能力。

article.title: You can still run the original Nvidia Control Panel by grabbing it from the Microsoft Store today — app remains useful to adjust a handful of RTX Pro and Quadro features, and may be handy for troubleshooting
article.summary: The old Nvidia Control Panel is now a separate, optional download, but is it worth grabbing?
article.title_zh: 你仍可透過 Microsoft Store 取得原始 Nvidia 控制面板 — 該應用程式仍可用於調整少數 RTX Pro 和 Quadro 功能，並可能有助於疑難排解
article.summary_zh: 舊版 Nvidia 控制面板現已成為獨立的可選下載項目，但值得安裝嗎？

article.title: Orpheus II ISA soundcard returns due to ‘popular demand’ — aimed at DOS and early Windows users, this card includes hardware to support every major audio standard
article.summary: Want real Sound Blaster, Gravis UltraSound, OPL3 FM synthesis, and MPU-401 MIDI support? You got it.
article.title_zh: Orpheus II ISA 音效卡因「大眾需求」回歸 — 專為 DOS 和早期 Windows 使用者設計，該卡包含支援所有主流音訊標準的硬體
article.summary_zh: 想要真正的 Sound Blaster、Gravis UltraSound、OPL3 FM 合成和 MPU-401 MIDI 支援？通通有。

article.title: AI推論躋身企業重要應用系統，F5最新報告點出多模型並用治理風險，以及身分管理成為企業採用AI代理的最大顧慮
article.summary: AI當道，隨著AI模型與代理式AI日益普及，網路應用程式交付與資安廠商F5今年5月最新發布的報告顯示，企業目前提供與防護應用系統的方式已因此徹底改變。
article.title_zh: AI推論躋身企業重要應用系統，F5最新報告點出多模型並用治理風險，以及身分管理成為企業採用AI代理的最大顧慮
article.summary_zh: AI當道，隨著AI模型與代理式AI日益普及，網路應用程式交付與資安廠商F5今年5月最新發布的報告顯示，企業目前提供與防護應用系統的方式已因此徹底改變。

article.title: SoftBank to spend up to $87 billion on French AI data centers — country offers ample nuclear grid that US sites lack
article.summary: SoftBank carries over $130 billion in debt and took a $40 billion bridge loan in March to fund its latest OpenAI investment.
article.title_zh: SoftBank 計劃耗資高達 870 億美元建立法國 AI 資料中心 — 法國擁有美國站點所缺乏的充足核電網絡
article.summary_zh: SoftBank 目前債務超過 1,300 億美元，並在三月時為最新的 OpenAI 投資獲得了 400 億美元的過橋貸款。

article.title: SoftBank Plans Up to €75 Billion Investment in French AI Centers
article.summary: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to invest as much as €75 billion ($87 billion) to build 5 gigawatts of artificial intelligence data center capacity in France, saying the country is poised to become a top European hub for AI infrastructure.
article.title_zh: 軟銀計畫在法國 AI 數據中心投資最高 750 億歐元
article.summary_zh: 軟銀集團計劃投資最高 750 億歐元（870 億美元）在法國建造 5 GW 的人工智慧數據中心產能，認為法國將成為歐洲 AI 基礎設施的頂級樞紐。

article.title: Intel details long-awaited Crescent Island AI GPU at Computex, boasts up to 480 GB of LPDDR5X to combat memory shortages — company shares more details of its Xe3P inference accelerator at Computex
article.summary: Intel revealed more details of its next-gen Data Center GPU, code-named Crescent Island, at Computex 2026. This inference-optimized chip will feature up to 480GB of LPDDR5X memory for efficient handling of massive AI contexts.
article.title_zh: Intel 在 Computex 詳細介紹期待已久的 Crescent Island AI GPU，吹噓最高 480GB LPDDR5X 記憶體以應對記憶體短缺——公司分享其 Xe3P 推理加速器的更多細節
article.summary_zh: Intel 在 Computex 2026 揭示了下一代資料中心 GPU Crescent Island 的更多細節，這款推理優化芯片將配備最高 480GB 的 LPDDR5X 記憶體，以有效處理大規模 AI 上下文。

article.title: Nvidia Says Anthropic, OpenAI Among Users of New Vera Chip
article.summary: Nvidia Corp. said Anthropic PBC, OpenAI and SpaceX are among the first big users of its upcoming microprocessor, securing key customers for its latest attempt to expand an already extensive footprint in AI data centers.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 表示 Anthropic、OpenAI 是新型 Vera 芯片的使用者
article.summary_zh: Nvidia 宣布 Anthropic、OpenAI 和 SpaceX 是其新型微處理器的首批大客戶，為其擴大 AI 資料中心影響力的最新嘗試提供保障。

article.title: Gen-Z Gamer’s 3D-Model Startup Becomes China’s Latest AI Unicorn
article.summary: Vast, a 3D-modeling startup founded by a 29-year-old gamer, raised nearly $200 million to become the latest Chinese AI outfit to achieve a valuation of $1 billion.
article.title_zh: Z 世代遊戲玩家的 3D 建模初創公司成為中國最新 AI 獨角獸
article.summary_zh: 由 29 歲遊戲玩家創立的 3D 建模初創公司 Vast 融資近 2 億美元，成為最新獲得 10 億美元估值的中國 AI 公司。

article.title: Here’s how Incogni helps you protect your family from scams and spam
article.summary: We manage huge chunks of our life online these days, which means there is a mass of personal data entrusted to a range of different companies. You probably already use Apple privacy tools like App Tracking Transparency , Hide My Email , and iCloud Private Relay , but none of that helps with data that is already out there publicly exposed on the internet. Even things as seemingly innocuous as our hobbies and interests can be valuable data when it comes to those who want to try to sell us things or – worse – to scam us. more…
article.title_zh: Incogni 如何幫助您保護家人免受詐騙和垃圾信息
article.summary_zh: 雖然 Apple 提供了 App Tracking Transparency、Hide My Email 和 iCloud Private Relay 等隱私保護工具，但 Incogni 可以幫助防止個人數據被第三方公司濫用。
